Chat WithoutLimits

Experience the next generation of private messaging. End-to-End encryption, ephemeral data, and zero logs. Your privacy is not just a feature, it's our foundation.

Start Chatting NowExplore Features
privlink.app/chat

Everything is encrypted locally.

Private by Default.

Why PrivLink?

Built for those who value digital sovereignty.

👻

Ghost Typing

See when someone is typing without revealing your own status. Asynchronous presence detection.

🛡️

Zero Logs

We don't know who you are, who you talk to, or what you say. No metadata retention.

💎

Neon Mode

A stunning visual experience designed for late-night conversations. Eye-friendly and stylish.

🎭

Anonymous Levels

Choose your visibility. Go full ghost, semi-anon, or public. You control your identity.

🔒

Biometric Lock

Secure specific chats behind a simulated biometric wall for an extra layer of privacy.

⚡

Real-time Socket

Lightning fast delivery with our optimized WebSocket architecture. Instant connection.
